title: KINGLAKE 2 Pcs Retractable Hanging Basket Pulley System, Hanging Basket Hooks Hanger Adjustable Pull Down Plant Pulley for Hanging Basket and Bird Feeder Rise and Fall
features: 【How to Use】1.Hang and pull down the hook; 2. attach the hanging basket and don't let go; 3. Gently raise the basket by hand to the desired height, then lower it slightly to activate the locking mechanism before releasing your grip until it is firmly secured；4. To lower the basket, place your hand underneath and gently push upwards to unlock, then lower to the desired height and slowly lower a little to lock.

【Sturdy & Reusable】Hanging basket pulley is made of high strength PET nylon belt, premium ABS plastic and metal hook, it can be pulled up to 90 cm, load 1-10 kg (weight less than 1 kg can not be fixed freely).

【Flexible& Adjustable】Hanging basket hook can be locked in any position as there are more than a dozen fixing points in the retractable area, much easier and safer than using a ladder to reach the hanging basket to water the plants.

【Humanized Design】The top of the metal triangle allows the plant to be hung stably, the open hook in the bottom helps the pot to be hung up and get it down anytime, so you can freely rise and down hanging baskets for easy irrigation or perfect display.

【Wide Application】Hanging plant pulleys are ideal for hanging basket, bird feeder, lanterns, wind chimes, suet baskets, ornaments, can be used in the eaves, garden, bedroom, porch, balcony, look house beautiful and saves space.
description: Product Description Retractable hanging basket pulley for home and garden decoration. KINGLAKE hanging basket pulley is suitable for decorative hanging basket, flowerpot, birdcage and more. It is a good idea so you can freely raise and lower flower pots or hanging baskets for easy irrigation or perfect display. Great for use on the balcony, roof, garden, indoors. Very nice gifts for relatives and friends, gardening lovers. How to Use Important Tips: 1. As the retractable hook internal spring has great flexibility, so there is the smallest lifting weight (less than 1 kg is not suitable). 2. Do not subject to shock loading by allowing basket to drop without support. 3. Please vertical pull down or up the rope when you want to adjust the different height. Durable Material & High Strength Belt The hanging basket pulley shell is made of high quality durable plastic, look very thick and about 2cm thick, come with built-in high-load PET nylon belt, it can be pulled up to 90 cm, load 1-10 kg (weight less than 1 kg can not be fixed freely). Retractable Hook Retractable hook can be suspended and locked in any position, In the retractable area more than a dozen fixed points are available. Hanging Stably & Easy to Remove The top of the metal triangle allows the plant to be hung stably, the open hook in the bottom helps the pot to be hung up and get it down anytime.
